description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure is predominantly white, featuring large glass windows and sliding doors that open onto a spacious wooden deck. The front yard is landscaped with several trees and a manicured lawn, while the backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool set apart from the main building. The property is bordered by paved walkways and driveways, providing access to the entrance and outdoor areas. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, clean lines, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white bungalow with large windows, a wooden deck, landscaped yard, and a separate swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, manicured lawn, driveway, and several trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the property, the arrangement of trees, and the detached swimming pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, large glass doors, and the rectangular swimming pool in the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, additional trees, and the pool's position relative to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
